name: io.github.verygoodplugins/mcp-evernote
title: MCP Evernote
description: Evernote note management with OAuth and ENML conversion

tools.name: evernote_create_note
tools.description: Create a new note in Evernote

tools.name: evernote_search_notes
tools.description: Search notes with Evernote query syntax (paged; optional full content)

tools.name: evernote_get_note
tools.description: Get one note (full detail) or a batch of up to 25 by GUID

tools.name: evernote_update_note
tools.description: Update a note (full-field, or patch mode via replacements[])

tools.name: evernote_list_notebooks
tools.description: List notebooks, or get one by name/guid

tools.name: evernote_list_tags
tools.description: List tags, or get one by name/guid

tools.name: evernote_get_resource
tools.description: Get an attachment by GUID, projected as text/binary/recognition/metadata

tools.name: evernote_add_resource_to_note
tools.description: Add a file/image attachment to a note
